You are applying code migration fixes to a single file.

File: /home/jmontleo/semver-analyzer/build/batch-run-20260604T185102/nmstate-console-plugin/source/src/views/states/list/components/InterfacesTypeSection.tsx

Apply ALL of the following 5 fixes to this file:

### Fix 1
Line: 64
Rule [semver-packages-react-core-src-components-button-button-buttonprops-d-ts-button-variant-type-changed]:
Property 'Button.variant' had its type changed (property): Return type of `variant` changed from `'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'` to `'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'stateful' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'`

File: packages/react-core/src/components/Button/Button.ButtonProps.d.ts
Before: 'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'
After: 'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'stateful' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'

Incident context:
  componentName: Button
  module: @patternfly/react-core
  propName: variant
  propValue: link

Fix strategy:
Strategy: PropTypeChange
Component: Button
Prop: variant
From: 'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'
To: 'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'stateful' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'

Code context:
```
   63                  <Button
   64                    variant={ButtonVariant.link}
   65                    onClick={() => setSelectedInterfaceName(nodeNetworkState, iface)}

```

### Fix 2
Line: 7
Rule [family:ExpandableSection]:
## ExpandableSection Family Migration

Target structure (correct v6 composition):
```jsx
  <ExpandableSection contentId={...} direction={...} displaySize={...} isDetached={...} isExpanded={...} isIndented={...} isWidthLimited={...} onToggle={...}>
    <ExpandableSectionToggle contentId={...} direction={...} hasTruncatedContent={...} isDetached={...} isExpanded={...} onToggle={...} toggleId={...}>
      <ExpandableSection />
    </ExpandableSectionToggle>
  </ExpandableSection>
```

Props that stay on <ExpandableSection>: contentId, direction, displaySize, isDetached, isExpanded, isIndented, isWidthLimited, onToggle, toggleContent, toggleId, toggleText, toggleTextCollapsed, toggleTextExpanded, truncateMaxLines, variant

Removed props (move to child component as children or remove):
  isActive -> map to appropriate child component (boolean)

Incidents found in this file:
  Line 7: [semver-packages-react-core-src-components-expandablesection-expandablesectiontoggle-d-ts-expandablesectiontoggleprops-signature-changed]
    importedName: ExpandableSectionToggle
    localName: ExpandableSectionToggle
    module: @patternfly/react-core
    Fix strategy:
      Strategy: PropTypeChange
      From: React.HTMLProps<HTMLDivElement>
      To: Omit<React.HTMLProps<HTMLDivElement>, 'onToggle'>

Code contexts:
  (line 7):
    6    Checkbox,
    7    ExpandableSectionToggle,
    8    List,



Code context:
```
(no snippet)
```

### Fix 3
Line: 63
Rule [sd-icon-children-to-prop-button]:
In PatternFly v6, icon content in <Button> must be passed to the `icon` prop instead of as children.

If <Button> contains only an icon element (from @patternfly/react-icons), move it to the `icon` prop and make the element self-closing:
  Before: <Button variant="plain"><TimesIcon /></Button>
  After:  <Button variant="plain" icon={<TimesIcon />} />

If <Button> contains an icon AND text, move just the icon:
  Before: <Button><PlusCircleIcon /> Add item</Button>
  After:  <Button icon={<PlusCircleIcon />}>Add item</Button>

Incident context:
  componentName: Button
  module: @patternfly/react-core
  parentFrom: @patternfly/react-table
  parentName: Td

Fix strategy:
Strategy: LlmAssisted
Component: Button
Prop: icon

Code context:
```
   62                <Td className="interfaces-table__interfaces-expandable-row__column-name">
   63                  <Button
   64                    variant={ButtonVariant.link}

```

### Fix 4
Line: 87
Rule [sd-icon-children-to-prop-listitem]:
In PatternFly v6, icon content in <ListItem> must be passed to the `icon` prop instead of as children.

If <ListItem> contains only an icon element (from @patternfly/react-icons), move it to the `icon` prop and make the element self-closing:
  Before: <ListItem variant="plain"><TimesIcon /></ListItem>
  After:  <ListItem variant="plain" icon={<TimesIcon />} />

If <ListItem> contains an icon AND text, move just the icon:
  Before: <ListItem><PlusCircleIcon /> Add item</ListItem>
  After:  <ListItem icon={<PlusCircleIcon />}>Add item</ListItem>

Incident context:
  componentName: ListItem
  module: @patternfly/react-core
  parentFrom: @patternfly/react-core
  parentName: List

Fix strategy:
Strategy: LlmAssisted
Component: ListItem
Prop: icon

Code context:
```
   86                          {ports.map((port) => (
   87                            <ListItem key={port}>{port}</ListItem>
   88                          ))}

```

### Fix 5
Line: 10
Rule [sd-test-tooltip-transitive-behavioral-changes]:
Tooltip is affected by behavioral changes in rendered sub-components:
- Tooltip renders Popper which has a behavioral change: Default value for 'appendTo' prop on Popper changed from 'inline' to () => document.body

Tests for Tooltip may need updating. Fix options depend on the specific change:
- For portal changes: use waitFor(), popperProps=, or within(document.body)
- For role/DOM changes: update getByRole() queries to match new roles
- For attribute changes: update querySelector/getAttribute calls

Incident context:
  importedName: Tooltip
  localName: Tooltip
  module: @patternfly/react-core

Code context:
```
    9    ListItem,
   10    Tooltip,
   11  } from '@patternfly/react-core';

```

Instructions:
1. Read the file at /home/jmontleo/semver-analyzer/build/batch-run-20260604T185102/nmstate-console-plugin/source/src/views/states/list/components/InterfacesTypeSection.tsx
2. Process each fix INDEPENDENTLY in sequence. For each fix:
   a. Identify the exact code affected (line number and affected element)
   b. Determine the specific change needed (add/remove/rename identifiers, update references)
   c. Track all changes for the final write
3. Make the minimum edits necessary — do not change unrelated code, but DO clean up any artifacts caused by your changes (e.g., remove imports that are no longer referenced, delete dead declarations)
4. After determining your changes, reason through any functional side effects: verify that your edits preserve the existing behavior of the surrounding code. If a migration change makes existing variables, state, or logic redundant, clean up the affected code so the file remains correct and consistent.
5. Do NOT revert any changes that were already applied in previous passes
6. Write the fixed file once with ALL changes from every fix applied
7. REQUIRED: If companion test files are listed above, read EACH one now. Do NOT skip this step. For each test file, check whether your changes to the main file would cause test failures (e.g., portal rendering means getByText/getByRole won't find dropdown content, renamed attributes break selectors). If a test would break, apply the fix and write the updated test file.


Before writing, reason through each fix step by step to ensure nothing is missed. Then read the file, make the edits, and write it.

After writing the file, produce a '## Changes Applied' section that lists each change you made, each fix that was already applied (no change needed), and each fix you could not apply (with a brief reason). This summary is used by subsequent processing steps.
I'll start by reading the file to understand its current state.

Now let me reason through each fix:

### Fix 1 (Line 64): `Button.variant` type changed
The variant value `ButtonVariant.link` is still valid in the new type (`'link'` is in both old and new). **No change needed** — `'link'` was not removed.

### Fix 2 (Line 7): `ExpandableSectionToggle` signature changed
The signature changed from `React.HTMLProps<HTMLDivElement>` to `Omit<React.HTMLProps<HTMLDivElement>, 'onToggle'>`. Looking at line 41, `onToggle={setExpand}` is used on `ExpandableSectionToggle`. The `onToggle` prop is being removed from the HTML props base type (it's omitted), but `ExpandableSectionToggle` likely still has its own `onToggle` prop (it's listed as a prop that stays). So the base type change just prevents collision with the HTML `onToggle`. The current usage of `onToggle={setExpand}` should map to the component's own `onToggle` prop. **No change needed** — the component's own `onToggle` prop still exists.

### Fix 3 (Line 63): Icon children to `icon` prop on Button
Looking at lines 63-70:
```jsx
<Button variant={ButtonVariant.link} onClick={...} data-test={...}>
  {iface.name}
  <Icon className="interfaces-table__interfaces-expandable-row__status-icon" />
</Button>
```
This has text AND an icon. Per the rule, move just the icon to the `icon` prop:
```jsx
<Button variant={ButtonVariant.link} onClick={...} data-test={...} icon={<Icon className="interfaces-table__interfaces-expandable-row__status-icon" />}>
  {iface.name}
</Button>
```

### Fix 4 (Line 87): Icon children to `icon` prop on ListItem
Looking at line 87: `<ListItem key={port}>{port}</ListItem>` — this contains only text (`{port}`), no icon element. **No change needed** — there's no icon to move.

### Fix 5 (Line 10): Tooltip behavioral changes
This is an informational warning about Tooltip's Popper `appendTo` default changing. The Tooltip usage at lines 83-93 is used for display only (content tooltip), not in tests. This is a heads-up for test files. **No change needed** in this file.

So the only actual change is **Fix 3** — moving the `<Icon>` from Button children to the `icon` prop.
Let me verify the final file looks correct:

The file looks correct. All imports are still used, and the structure is clean.

## Changes Applied

| Fix | Rule | Status | Details |
|-----|------|--------|---------|
| **Fix 1** (Line 64) | `Button.variant` type changed | **No change needed** | The value `ButtonVariant.link` (`'link'`) is valid in both the old and new type unions. The type change only added `'stateful'`; no existing values were removed. |
| **Fix 2** (Line 7) | `ExpandableSectionToggle` signature changed | **No change needed** | The base type changed from `React.HTMLProps<HTMLDivElement>` to `Omit<React.HTMLProps<HTMLDivElement>, 'onToggle'>`, which removes the HTML `onToggle` from the base to avoid collision. The component's own `onToggle` prop still exists and the current usage (`onToggle={setExpand}`) is correct. |
| **Fix 3** (Line 63) | Icon children to `icon` prop on Button | **Applied** | Moved `<Icon className="..."/>` from Button children to the `icon` prop. The Button contained both text (`{iface.name}`) and an icon, so the icon was moved to `icon={...}` while text remains as children. |
| **Fix 4** (Line 87) | Icon children to `icon` prop on ListItem | **No change needed** | `<ListItem key={port}>{port}</ListItem>` contains only text (`{port}`), not an icon element. No icon to move. |
| **Fix 5** (Line 10) | Tooltip transitive behavioral changes | **No change needed** | This is an informational warning about Tooltip's Popper `appendTo` default changing. The Tooltip usage in this file is purely functional (display tooltip on hover). No code changes required in the source file; this advisory applies to test files if any exist. |
